findings: README documents dead-agent PID recovery and metaswarm partial/no-silent-downgrade guardrails
stuck detection is mentioned, but recovery behavior for stuck-yet-still-alive agents is not explained

observability language overstates visibility by saying every agent runs in a visible pane, while metaswarm later clarifies only commander panes are visible and child-worker recovery/visibility semantics remain undocumented
teardown documentation is minimal and does not explain treatment of in-flight work, nested commander state, logs/pids, or partial results during stop/recovery
